title: Organized Crime Syndicate
description: A powerful crime syndicate has taken root in our cities due to high crime rates. Do we launch a massive police raid or try to negotiate?

choices.name: Launch a Massive Police Raid
choices.description: Hit them with everything we have. It will cause temporary unrest but crush the syndicate.

choices.name: Turn a Blind Eye
choices.description: Let them handle the underground as long as they don't bother the state. The people won't like it.

title: Public Health Emergency
description: Hospitals are overcrowded and our health infrastructure is failing. Citizens are demanding immediate action!

choices.name: Emergency Health Subsidies
choices.description: Divert state funds to hospitals immediately.

choices.name: Rely on Private Clinics
choices.description: We cannot afford a state intervention. Let the private sector handle it.

title: The Brain Drain
description: Our highly educated youth cannot find jobs. Many are packing their bags to leave the country.

choices.name: Create State Jobs
choices.description: Open new research facilities and state offices to employ them.
